title: lippia recolletae
intro: Lippia recolletae is a plant species belonging to the Verbenaceae family, commonly known as the "Mexican oregano" due to its similar flavor and aroma to oregano. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lippia recolletae include relief from respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Lippia recolletae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits, and it can also be used as a culinary herb to add flavor to various dishes.
